latin: Creatura sola per montes errabat. homines eam videntes fugiebant et lapides iaciebant. 'cur me fecisti si nemo me amare potest?' creatori suo clamavit. monstrum non natum est — factum est.

questions.prompt: How do people react to the creature?
What does the creature ask its creator?
questions.target: Why was I made if no one can love me?
choices: Why was I made if no one can love me?

translation: The creature wandered alone through the mountains. People who saw it fled and threw stones. 'Why did you make me if no one can love me?' it cried to its creator. The monster was not born — it was made.
